title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 26 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 26 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 26 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/08/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and keep upaward all the day.The main contract closed at 735,increased of 3.01%. Steel mills are more mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 765-770uan/mt,increase 5-10yuan/mt than yesterday; SSF at Shandong port dealt 643-652yuan/mt,increase 5-10yuan/mt than yesterday .PBF at Tangshan dealt 773-780yuan/mt,increase 5-15 yuan/mt than yesterday. As of August 26, the inventory of 35 ports tracked by SMM totaled 134.31 million tons, a decrease of 760000 tons compared with last week and an increase of 4.7 million tons compared with the same period of last year.
